about.name: Victor Faria Fernandes
about.subtitle: Hello, I'm
about.title: About Me
about.content:
I build dynamic interfaces with React, manage databases with PostgreSQL, and optimize APIs with Express.

I automate CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and use Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform for container orchestration and infrastructure as code. I integrate systems with messaging tools like Kafka, SQS, and SNS, ensuring high availability and performance. I resolve critical bugs, drive continuous security improvements, mentor teammates, lead code reviews, and collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to shape product and architecture strategies.

items.title: Full Stack Developer
items.subtitle: Enso Connect · Full-time
items.content: I develop new features from scratch and maintain production systems, focusing on user experience, efficiency, and code quality. I use React, Python, and AWS to deliver reliable and efficient results, and leverage DynamoDB, Cognito, and Amplify to maintain and scale startup products.

items.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
items.subtitle: OLX Brasil
items.content: I led distributed systems development with Node.js, Golang, and Python, using React for interfaces and PostgreSQL for data management. I implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, automated infrastructure with Terraform and Kubernetes, and built asynchronous integrations with Kafka, SQS, and SNS. I mentored engineers and tackled complex architectural and performance challenges.

items.title: Mid-Level Full Stack Developer
items.subtitle: Rede D'or São Luiz
items.content: I developed backend systems with Node.js and front-end applications with Angular and React. I integrated MongoDB and Redis for storage and caching solutions, and used Docker and Express to optimize the environment. I actively contributed to code reviews and implemented automated tests.

items.title: Junior Full Stack Developer
items.subtitle: OI S.A
items.content: I built applications with Node.js and React, integrating MongoDB and Redis for data optimization. I implemented APIs with Express and configured environments with Docker. I participated in bug resolution and supported continuous deployment workflows.

items.title: Technical Degree in Digital Game Programming
items.subtitle: NAVE - Núcleo Avançado em Educação
